---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or behavior change
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

<!-- What user / contributor pain point does this solve? Be concrete: who
does this affect and in what situation? Avoid jumping straight to the
solution. -->

## Proposal

<!-- Describe the change you're proposing. If you have a clear idea of the
implementation, include it; otherwise, sketch the desired behavior and let
the maintainers help shape the design. -->

## Scope

<!-- What's in / out of scope for this change? -->

- In scope:
  -
- Out of scope:
  -

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposal. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links to related issues, prior discussions, etc. -->
